meaning: 斯法克斯[突尼斯东部港市]
examples: Zimbabwe begin their Nations Cup campaign against Egypt on 25 January in Sfax.
Stadiums in Bizerte, Monastir and Sfax are being refurbished for the event and are supposed to be finished by November.
In the last 24 hours there have been disturbing reports of widespread looting and rioting in provincial towns, including Sfax.
